figures.caption: Figure 2. Accuracy (%) on xLAM as a function of the number of SMC particles comparing proposals LCD, GCD, and P-GCD.

Figure 1. An illustration of an NFA corresponding to a JSON schema object of the form {"x": <integer>}, together with its tensorized representation. It consists of a transition matrix Tout and an emission matrix Bf , which encode state transitions and symbol emissions, respectively. For simplicity, the incoming transition matrix Tin is omitted in the figure.
